drl:
rule "R0"
when
    (or $p0_0 : T0(f2 in (10), f0 in (-1000000007), $b0_0_0 : f3) $p0_0 : T0(f1 <= 7, f3 != false, $b0_0_0 : f3))
then
    insert(new T1($p0_0.getF1(), $p0_0.getF0(), $b0_0_0));
end
rule "R1"
salience -3
when
    T0($b1_0_0 : f3, $b1_0_1 : f2)
    T1(f0 > 5, f1 < 3, f2 != $b1_0_0)
    not(T1() and T0(f1 != 1.5))
then
end
rule "R2"
salience($b2_0_0 + $b2_0_1)
when
    $p2_0 : T0(f2 in (3.5, -3.0), $b2_0_0 : f2, $b2_0_1 : f2)
then
    insert(new T1($p2_0.getF1(), 12, $p2_0.isF3()));
    insert(new T1(2, 100, $p2_0.isF3()));
end
rule "R3"
agenda-group "gb"
when
    accumulate( T0(f0 in (-5, -0.5, 100), f3 == true, $s3_0 : f1); $a3_0 : sum($s3_0) )
then
    insert(new T1(100, 6, false));
end
rule "R4"
when
    $p4_0 : T0(f1 <= 10)
then
    drools.setFocus("gb");
    insert(new T1($p4_0.getF1(), -1000000007, $p4_0.isF3()));
end
rule "R5"
when
    T1(f2 not in (false, true), f2 != false)
then
end
